ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of traffic parameters */,
  "cav_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage of connected and autonomous vehicles in the traffic */,
  "zov_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage of zero-occupancy vehicles */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of transportation facility (e.g., Freeway) */,
  "intervehicle_gap" REAL /* Average gap between vehicles */,
  "max_platoon" INTEGER /* Maximum number of vehicles in a platoon */,
  "cav_interplatoon_gap" INTEGER /* Gap between CAV platoons */,
  "base_capacity" INTEGER /* Base capacity of the traffic facility */,
  "caf" REAL /* Capacity adjustment factor */,
  "update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the traffic parameters were last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the traffic parameters */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the traffic parameters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_parameters_facility_type FOREIGN KEY ("facility_type") REFERENCES facility_details ("type")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_details" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the transportation facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the facility */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the facility location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the facility location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platoon_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platoon configuration */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the configuration is applied */,
  "cav_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage of CAVs in the platoon */,
  "max_platoon" INTEGER /* Maximum number of vehicles in a platoon */,
  "cav_interplatoon_gap" INTEGER /* Gap between CAV platoons */,
  "platoon_speed" REAL /* Speed of the platoon */,
  "platoon_acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration of the platoon */,
  "platoon_deceleration" REAL /* Deceleration of the platoon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_platoon_configurations_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facility_details ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic analytic entry */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "traffic_flow" INTEGER /* Traffic flow rate */,
  "congestion_level" TEXT /* Level of congestion */,
  "emission_reduction" REAL /* Percentage reduction in emissions */,
  "traffic_volume" INTEGER /* Total traffic volume */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of traffic */,
  "travel_time" REAL /* Average travel time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_analytics_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facility_details ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic signal */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the traffic signal is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the traffic signal */,
  "timing" TEXT /* Timing of the traffic signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_signals_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facility_details ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lanes" (
  "lane_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lane */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the lane is located */,
  "assignment" TEXT /* Assignment of the lane */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the lane */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lane_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lanes_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facility_details ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platoon_vehicles" (
  "platoon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platoon */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle in the platoon */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the vehicle in the platoon */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle in the platoon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platoon_id", "vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance request */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the maintenance is requested */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance request */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_requests_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facility_details ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency response */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the emergency response is required */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the emergency response */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the emergency response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_responses_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facility_details ("facility_id")
)
